sourcesContent:
import React, { Fragment } from 'react'
import { Route, Routes } from 'react-router-dom'
import Layout from '../components/Layout/Layout'

const LayoutRoutes = () => {
  return (
    <Fragment>
        <Routes>
            <Route element={<Layout />}>

            </Route>
        </Routes>
    </Fragment>
  )
}

export default LayoutRoutes
